So, the way Kathi works is that her cards have something called "Fiamma" and cards gain or lose Fiamma stacks by passing them around on Kathi's cards. Kathi's cards can gain up to 3 Fiamma and each Fiamma basically multiplies the effects the cards have.
when card has 3 fiamma play it except if it's solar/hyperflare otherwise keep playing cards w fiamma to keep stacking until hyperflare
Her cards have retain if they have flammia on it, so you don't always have to play them

Each time you play a card with those Fiamma, you gain a Fiamma stack (it's that little Flame under your health bar). At 10 Fiamma stacks, you gain 2 Arithmetica and her Solar Flare card transforms into something called Hyperflare
If I use hyperflare will it do enough dmg to oneshot
You should exalt kath, play her def card and then play hyperflare for 0 cost to reset the stack
You don't want to play her solar flare for 2 cost if you can avoid it
It's always better to wait for it to transform first

The loop for Kathi is to typically use her 1 fiamma stack cards or her her 3 fiamma stacks to give her Aliemus and to get her Fiamma under her HP bar closer to 10. Once she has enough Aliemus she can exalt or over-exalt to get her cards as well as add more Fiamma stacks to them <@409644033359478794>
Well you could say the guide is
Generally if you have a +4 Kathi you want to try and get Over-exalt, as it's a lot more powerful and is generally pretty easy to get to

Early on, it's best to use her Rouse as soon as possible too, as her Rouse makes it so that any card with 3 Fiamma stacks is returned to your hand after playing it <@409644033359478794> - this makes it easier to keep the loop going of playing her cards and giving htem more fiamma stacks
